---
title: "Homework11"
author: "HudsonPlaskoff"
date: "2026-04-18"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(nycflights13)
```

## Origin and Destination Pairs^[Question 1 complete]

```{r}
pairs <- flights %>%
  group_by(origin,dest) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n()
  )

knitr::kable(pairs %>% head())
```
